title: India Buoying Global Steel Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
The most recently released data shows that global steel production totaled approximately 151.4 million tons in June. This is down month-on-month by 7.4 million tons (-4%) and is down year-on-year by 10 million tons (-6%). Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 68.2 million tons last month.
